risks.description: Desktop FTP direct-play could accidentally switch to a transcode path.
risks.mitigation: Feature flag defaults off; activation smoke tests must verify proxy/raw/direct source preservation.
risks.verification: desktop FTP direct-play smoke test and no desktop FFmpeg assertion

risks.description: Mobile HLS selection could change for clients that still require HLS.
risks.mitigation: Preserve existing mobile client detection and run mobile HLS smoke tests before canary.

risks.description: Desktop direct playback could start FFmpeg when direct playback should be preserved.
risks.mitigation: Activation must keep desktop direct-play on existing direct/proxy/raw behavior unless source-seek is explicitly required.
risks.verification: no FFmpeg process during desktop direct-play smoke test

risks.description: Planning or activation could accidentally alter live playback URLs.
risks.mitigation: Activation plan excludes live-specific changes and requires unchanged live smoke test behavior.

risks.description: A future activation could register the route without a fail-closed feature flag.
risks.mitigation: Boundary manifest requires STREAMVAULT_INACTIVE_HASKELL_PLAYBACK_ROUTE and flag-off behavior.
risks.verification: flag-off smoke test and runtime boundary review

risks.description: Operators could lack a fast emergency disable path.
risks.mitigation: Rollback plan defines flag-off first, revert second.
risks.verification: emergency disable checklist item completed before activation
